task_info.description: 基于 STM32F405 真机时延对静态 Compute Cost 的 add:multiply:MAP 权重进行整定

recommended_cost_model.basis: Calibrated against measured STM32F405 board latency using a least-squares scale factor and a lightly regularized search over add-normalized mul/map ratios.

conclusions: Complete axes: H_UNITS, INNER_KAN_UNITS, INNER_KAN_LAYERS, GRID_SIZE, SPLINE_ORDER.
GRID_SIZE and SPLINE_ORDER keep the same current LUT compute-cost estimate when H/U/L are unchanged.
